  1. it.polimi.ingsw.am

Uses of Interface
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.screen.GuiScreen

Packages that use GuiScreen
Package
Description
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.screen
 

  • Uses of GuiScreen in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.screen

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.screen that implement GuiScreen
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ConnectionScreen
    Initial screen: user picks transport (Socket/RMI), host and port.
    final class 
    EndGameScreen
    End-game screen: winner, this match's final standings, the local player's position in the historical leaderboard (for matches with the same player count), and a button to view the full leaderboard.
    final class 
    GameScreen
    Main game screen.
    final class 
    LobbyScreen
    Lobby screen.
    final class 
    MatchesScreen
    Match selection screen: list open matches, join one, or create a new one.
    final class 
    NicknameScreen
    Nickname picker.
    final class 
    ReconnectScreen
    Shown only when the connection dropped while the player was in a running match — i.e. the previous match was closed by a server crash.
    final class 
    RecoveryLobbyScreen
    Lobby-style screen shown after reconnecting to a crash-recovered match that is still waiting for its other players.
    final class 
    TotemSelectionScreen
    Pre-game totem selection scene.
